description: API contract between ShadowTrace backend and frontend. Full OpenAPI is served at /docs when the backend runs. This file lists endpoints the frontend is expected to bind to.

endpoints.POST /scan/start: Kick off a scan. Body: {domain, subnet?}. Returns {scan_id, status}.
endpoints.GET /scan/latest: Metadata for the most recent scan.
endpoints.GET /scan/diff?before=A&after=B: Assets/edges/paths added or removed, risk delta, time-to-breach delta.
endpoints.POST /demo/replay/latest: Replay the latest persisted scan over the WebSocket for offline demo.
endpoints.GET /assets: All assets in the latest scan.
endpoints.GET /asset/{id}: Detailed view of one asset (ports, CVEs, tech stack, admin panels, TLS).
endpoints.GET /graph: Nodes + edges for D3. Edges carry rule_id, rationale, attack_techniques, evidence, verified_at.
endpoints.GET /rulebook: Named rule catalog with MITRE ATT&CK technique tags.
endpoints.GET /attack-path?persona=criminal: Top-ranked chain with alternates, remediations, and persona-specific time-to-breach.
endpoints.POST /attack-path/simulate: Body {patched_asset_ids, patched_cve_ids, persona?}. Returns before/after plus blocked path IDs.
endpoints.POST /lab/validate: Fires safe read-only probes against lab containers; stamps verified edges with response snippet.
endpoints.GET /report/pdf: Downloadable PDF with threat-analyst assessment, attack chain, inventory, and rulebook appendix.

attack_path_response.hops[].attack_techniques: list of MITRE ATT&CK IDs (T1190, T1078, ...)
attack_path_response.hops[].evidence: structured dict: matched keywords, CVE IDs, panel paths, subnet, bucket name
attack_path_response.hops[].verified_at: set if /lab/validate proved the hop live
attack_path_response.alternates: up to 2 other candidate paths with their own hops and time-to-breach
attack_path_response.remediation_candidates: aggregated fixes ranked by how many modeled paths they break
attack_path_response.persona: display label of the attacker profile used for estimates
